items.title: X fights Andrew and Tristan Tate's bid to unmask anonymous critics

children.content: Misogynist influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate have struck a hurdle in their bid to unmask anonymous users they allege have defamed them, with social media platform X asking a Florida court to dismiss the motion.

items.title: Snowtown killer James Vlassakis's image has been revealed. Here's why

children.content: The youngest of the Snowtown killers was the subject of a long-running suppression order that kept his face — or any description of his appearance — hidden for 25 years. Here's why that's been lifted.

items.title: Outback landholders opening gate to large-scale renewable projects

children.content: If you mention renewable energy to agricultural producers in many regional communities, you will likely ruffle some feathers. But in far west NSW, landholders are showing preliminary support for a planned expansion of solar and wind energy assets.

items.title: Worst diphtheria outbreak on record spurs $7m federal vaccine response

items.title: Paedophile former magistrate to be released on home detention

items.title: El Niño looms as BOM releases long-range winter forecast

items.title: As Colbert wraps up The Late Show, late-night TV could be on shaky ground
